title: Emerald++
description: This is a mod which adds Emerald Tools & Armor into Vanilla Minecraft.
body: Go Explore a new tier of tools & armor crafted from emeralds in Minecraft. This mod allows you to get a permenant Haste effect while wearing the armor, unless you wear full Armor piece. Positioned between diamond and netherite tiers, providing a reliable choice for both efficiency and durability.
